author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Raji: Kaliyuga Gameplay Trailer | XBOX
Nodding Heads Games reveals the first Gameplay Trailer for  Raji: Kaliyuga. The unsealing of the heavens by the asura warlord Mahabalasura escalates the conflict within the game to a cosmic level. This grand battle encompasses not only mortals but also gods, asuras, and mystical entities.

Raji, now a seasoned warrior, and her dreamwalking brother Darsh, journey to the Eternal Summit to save or destroy the universe. Raji: Kaliyuga features dual protagonists: Raji, with acrobatic martial arts and the Trishul, and Darsh, with immense Siddhi powers that control gravity, time, and energy. It introduces customized evasion for Raji and a siddhi-yielding system for Darsh, allowing unique combat styles. 

The game shifts from an isometric action-adventure to a third-person action-adventure, with Nodding Heads Games committed to delivering a high-quality experience for fans.

Raji: Kaliyuga is coming to XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC as an XBOX Play Anywhere title and with XBOX Game Pass: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/raji-kaliyuga/9NMTFNBHX6TZ
